mapper.update: UPDATE sal_order SET customer_id = #{customerId}, customer_name = #{customerName}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, order_date = #{orderDate}, delivery_date = #{deliveryDate}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, final_amount = #{finalAmount}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sal_order WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT * FROM sal_order
is_deleted = false
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sal_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{dateStr}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE sal_order SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
